CREATE TABLE geo_multipolygon (mpg MultiPolygon) ENGINE = Memory();
CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt32, shape MultiPolygon) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT mpg FROM geo_multipolygon WHERE length(mpg) > 1;
SELECT id, shape FROM geo_data WHERE shape = [[[(0, 0), (0, 10), (10, 10), (10, 0)]]] AND id IN (SELECT id FROM geo_data WHERE id > 0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_data WHERE shape[1] IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT mpg FROM geo_multipolygon WHERE toTypeName(mpg) = 'MultiPolygon') AS subquery SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE border_points (point MultiPolygon) ENGINE = Memory();
SELECT point FROM border_points WHERE point[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM geo_data WHERE shape = shape;
